name: Large Wood Geo Assembled Table Lamp Brown - Threshold™: No Assembly, UL Listed, Cotton Shade
description: Add a modern spin to your lighting with the Large Wood Geo Assembled Table Lamp from Threshold™. An open geometrical frame accents the brown wooden base of this large freestanding table lamp for eye-catching style, and it's topped with a textured fabric drum shade for evenly distributing the light in your space. Standing at a height of 23.5 inches, this decorative table lamp adds beautiful natural elegance and charm to anywhere in your house, from next to a comfortable sofa or lounge chair in your living room to your reading nook and more.
